Gandi Totem Spirit:
From what I can tell, Kasha Orcs are the most dangerous foes that High Orcs have ever had to face.
To defeat them, we need to learn more about the source of their might - the Chaos Power. It seems to me that the power itself is completely neutral.
I mean that it can be used for good deeeds as well as heinous crimes.
In other words, if you manage to get a hold of this power, it might become the weapon we need to destroy the enemy.
The Chaos Power might be the tool that lets you fulfill your destiny.
